description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to GitHub that triggers on push of tags matching *-r[0-9]+ and on workflow dispatch with a required tag input. The workflow should have three jobs: package-win64 and package-linux64 that build win64 and linux64 releases using separate workflows, and create-update-release that drafts a GitHub release after the build jobs complete. The release job should checkout the repository, generate release text, stage and archive the releases, and create or update a GitHub release with the generated text and archived artifacts.
